llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Manager, Order to Invoice (OTI)
job.description: 1. Strategic business engagement: Participate in the development and implementation of G-EDM's business strategy, process improvements, and digitalization initiatives. Enhance business competitiveness by introducing new concepts and establishing expert networks. Advocate for process improvements and digitalization to relevant stakeholders. 2. Process Improvement Digitalization - NGBA steering associated improvements: As the global point of contact for G-EDM Order to Invoice (OTI) processes, lead participate in the development, optimization and automation of processes related to OTI domain. Guide Customer Service Leads across countries to define the NGBA end-state solution and finalize process models. Conduct regular analysis of existing processes and IT environment for further development. 3. Change Management - Technical Organizational: Identify global/country specific features and enable NGBA workshops for Order to Invoice (OTI). Drive role-based training for users across G-EDM. Develop user documentation, process descriptions, guidelines, and procedural instructions. 4. Stakeholder Management Global Coordination: Provide updates to key stakeholders on NGBA implementation progress, achievements, and improvements in Order to Invoice (OTI). Represent G-EDM in business experts' communities and NGBA forums for Order to Invoice (OTI) topics. Build internal G-EDM Order to Invoice (OTI) expert community.
